tasks.label: build-all
tasks.command: npm run compile 2>&1 ; $csc="$env:WINDIR\Microsoft.NET\Framework64\v4.0.30319\csc.exe" ; $root="c:\Users\plachy\Documents\Dev\VSCplugins\AIAPI" ; $uiac=(Get-ChildItem "$env:WINDIR\Microsoft.NET" -Recurse -Filter UIAutomationClient.dll -EA SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1).FullName ; $uiat=(Get-ChildItem "$env:WINDIR\Microsoft.NET" -Recurse -Filter UIAutomationTypes.dll -EA SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1).FullName ; $wbase=(Get-ChildItem "$env:WINDIR\Microsoft.NET" -Recurse -Filter WindowsBase.dll -EA SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1).FullName ; & $csc /nologo /target:winexe "/out:$root\dist\win\KeyWin.exe" "/r:$uiac" "/r:$uiat" "/r:$wbase" "$root\tools\common\HelperCommon.cs" "$root\tools\win\KeyWin.cs" ; Write-Host "KeyWin exit=$LASTEXITCODE" ; & $csc /nologo /target:exe "/out:$root\dist\browser\BrowserWin.exe" "$root\tools\common\HelperCommon.cs" "$root\tools\browser\BrowserWin.cs" ; Write-Host "BrowserWin exit=$LASTEXITCODE"

tasks.label: git-commit-xmlscenario
tasks.command:
git add src/scenario/xmlScenarioLoader.test.ts src/__mocks__/jsdom-mock.js src/__mocks__/encoding-stub.js jest.config.json TODO.md ; git commit -m "test: xmlScenarioLoader unit tests (27) + jsdom CJS mock

Adds 27 unit tests for src/scenario/xmlScenarioLoader.ts covering:
  - XmlScenarioLoader.substitute(): 7 tests (pure static, no I/O)
  - executeXmlScenario(): 14 tests with mocked callFn covering WAIT,
    LISTWINDOWS/hwnd-binding, conditional=absent skip/run, variable
    substitution in target/parameter, success/fail/throw handling,
    multi-step aggregation, result metadata
  - XmlScenarioLoader filesystem: 6 tests using real temp-dir XML
    (listScenarios, load flat, load with ScenarioRef expansion,
    unknown-app/scenario errors, circular ScenarioRef detection)

jsdom v28 pulls in @asamuzakjp/css-color, @exodus/bytes and other
ESM-only transitive dependencies which are incompatible with Jest
in CJS mode (SyntaxError: Unexpected token export).
Fix: src/__mocks__/jsdom-mock.js â€” minimal CJS-only JSDOM replacement
with a stack-based XML parser that implements the exact DOM API subset
used by xmlScenarioLoader (querySelector, querySelectorAll, getAttribute,
childNodes, nodeType, tagName).  jest.config.json gets moduleNameMapper
to redirect "jsdom" to this mock for all Jest runs.

TODO.md: xmlScenarioLoader unit tests marked [x]; jsdom workaround noted."

tasks.label: git-commit-xmlscenario-2
tasks.command: git add src/scenario/xmlScenarioLoader.test.ts src/__mocks__/jsdom-mock.js src/__mocks__/encoding-stub.js jest.config.json TODO.md ; git commit -F commit-msg.txt ; Remove-Item commit-msg.txt ; git push
